mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO amz_fba_shipment_box ( sid, shipment_id, box_type, box_length, box_width, box_height, box_weight, box_volume, box_dimensions_unit, box_weight_unit, box_num, box_no, msku, sku, product_name, fulfillment_network_sku, quantity_in_case ) VALUES
( #{e.sid}, #{e.shipmentId}, #{e.boxType}, #{e.boxLength}, #{e.boxWidth}, #{e.boxHeight}, #{e.boxWeight}, #{e.boxVolume}, #{e.boxDimensionsUnit}, #{e.boxWeightUnit}, #{e.boxNum}, #{e.boxNo}, #{e.msku}, #{e.sku}, #{e.productName}, #{e.fulfillmentNetworkSku}, #{e.quantityInCase} )
mapper.update: UPDATE amz_fba_shipment_box b JOIN amz_product_listing p ON b.msku COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = p.seller_sku SET b.sku = CASE WHEN b.sku IS NULL OR b.sku = '' THEN p.local_sku ELSE b.sku END, b.product_name = CASE WHEN b.product_name IS NULL OR b.product_name = '' THEN p.local_name ELSE b.product_name END WHERE b.sku IS NULL OR b.sku = '' OR b.product_name IS NULL OR b.product_name = ''
